packageRules.description: Keep typebox on a weekly cadence to avoid noisy daily PRs.
ESLint core, plugins, and TS-ESLint move together because plugin/parser versions are tightly bound to the ESLint major.
Playwright runner + browsers must move in lockstep.
Gatsby core + plugins + scoped @gatsbyjs/* packages are version-coupled.
Vitest core + UI must match.
Testing Library packages share peer-dep ranges and break together.
Fastify core + official plugins.
React + ReactDOM + react-test-renderer + their @types must ship together; v18→v19 is the canonical case.
Redux core + React bindings + middleware/utilities. They aren't a true monorepo so Renovate doesn't auto-group them.
unist-util-* live in many separate repos but the v3+ unist-util-is API change cascades through all of them. Group to avoid 12 PRs landing piecemeal.
mdast-util-* migrate together with each major remark wave.
micromark core + extensions move together.
hast utilities (HTML AST) — sibling to mdast/unist.
Stripe server SDK + React bindings + JS SDK migrate together to keep the checkout flow consistent.
i18next core + React bindings + backends.
final-form + react-final-form have hard peer-dep coupling.
Monaco editor + React wrapper + webpack plugin move together (API surface drifts otherwise).
dotenv + dotenv-cli share parser semantics.
Joi + ObjectId extension; ObjectId v4 requires Joi v17+.
pino + pino-pretty + transports.
nodemailer runtime + its types (overrides the generic types group via merge precedence).
FontAwesome icon packs + React component must match major.
xterm.js core + addons.
Sandpack React + themes.
GrowthBook SDK + React bindings.
Algolia client + InstantSearch.js + React InstantSearch. v5 of algoliasearch ships with the matching InstantSearch wave so they belong together.
Build toolchain: webpack core + CLI + analyzer + babel-loader. Keeps a single bundler PR per cycle.
